headline: Apple Eyes Sony Partnership For Game-Changing Vision Pro Upgrade
summary: Apple and Sony are reportedly joining hands to augment the gaming capabilities of the Vision Pro.

headline: Musk-Altman Rivalry Intensifies With Trump's Appointment of David Sacks
summary: The recent appointment of David Sacks as the "White House A.I. and Crypto Czar" by President-elect Donald Trump has sparked a new chapter in the ongoing rivalry between billionaire Elon Musk and Sam Altman, head of OpenAI.

headline: Quantum Computing Stocks Roundup: D-Wave, Rigetti, IonQ Lead the Charge With Explosive Growth

headline: Rigetti Computing Skyrockets To Record High As Investor Confidence Soars
summary: The stock of Rigetti Computing has hit a new 52-week high, reaching $3.67.

headline: Tesla's Challenges, Rivian's Triumph, And Lucid's Ambitions: This Week In EVs
summary: The electric vehicle sector experienced a dynamic week with key developments, including Danny Moses ending his Tesla short position, Cathie Wood criticizing a judge's ruling on Musk's pay, Rivian's high customer satisfaction, Tesla's Cybertruck facing challenges despite strong sales, and Lucid beginning production of its Gravity SUV.

headline: Consumer Tech News (Dec 2-Dec 6): FBI Advises To Adopt Encrypted Messaging Apps, Elon Musk Completed First Starlink Satellite Constellation & More
summary: FBI advises using encrypted messaging apps to safeguard communications; Gamers spend more time watching gaming content than playing; Disney+ expands with ESPN integration; Amazon unveils AI chip clusters to enhance performance for partners.
